text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer hasn't been feeling well lately, so
the two of us decide to pray at a shrine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
...Anyway, that's what I wished for. Do you think
it's okay to ask for that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it's not like we're super tight with the
gods or anything, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
We basically only ever drop by to say hi when
we're in trouble and need a favor or something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So I'd like to do something nice for them in
return. I wonder what kinda good deeds I can do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Look, there's a bunch of a bamboo brooms
over there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You think I can rack up some divine brownie
points if I sweep up the place? It's basically the
same as helping out with house chores, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right! Let's clean this place up so good, the
gods will be shooketh when they see it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mejiro Palmer and I clean the shrine
grounds from top to bottom.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There! This place is clean as a whistle! I bet it'll be
okay if I ask upstairs for a favor now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Okay, here I go. Ahem... Please hear my wish.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whew... Going on that cleaning spree cleared out
the cobwebs in my head too. It's like a weight's
been taken off me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I feel so invigorated, and, like... I guess free and
light?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Omigosh, wait. Could it be the gods blessed me
already?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks, gods! Watch my next race, 'kay?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a relief to see Mejiro Palmer looking bright
and energetic again. I silently thank the gods as
well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
After all this cleaning, surely the gods'll help
grant my wi—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, a strong gust of wind sweeps through
the area and scatters all the leaves and trash we
just swept up all over the grounds again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh. Em. GEE! Are you for real right now?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
We'd better get this cleaned up, quick! Um,
where'd that broom go?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even asking the gods for help doesn't come
easy... In the end, Mejiro Palmer's condition fails
to improve.
